description: Style Note Understated and compact, yet spacious, this baggit's purse is designed to leave the onlookers bowled over by its awesome look and appeal. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece as a sling bag and wear it across your shoulder or simply carry your essentials, using it as a basic pouch. Product Details Green purse with floral print Has two main zippered compartmentsOne pocket with zip closure on the back Detachable coloured shoulder strap Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 9 cm Width: 16 cmDepth: 2 cm
